title: Smelt Raw Block
description: Smelt Raw Block directly into ingots into your furnaces
body:
Allow to smelt Raw Block directly into their ingots (and not into full block!).
The smelting process of a Raw Block take the same time and give the same experience que si vous avez smelt each of the 9 raw items that compose the block. And of course, the smelt of 1 Raw Block give 9 ingots.

Furnace and Blast Furnace both supported for Iron, Gold and Copper.

![furnace preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L54EcwnD/images/57ea16934003e8d7346af4f9d7c22400a0ec65b6.gif)

This smelting recipes are more balanced that completly convert a Raw Block into a Full block of the element. By output the individuals ingots, you still need to manage your ingots production and eventualy convert them into block. Mostly, it just a more handy input for regular ingots.
